title: Video and audio content processing through machine learning models for delivery to aircraft inflight entertainment systems
abstract: A method is performed by a computer system of a content service provider for executing a quality assurance and/or quality control (QA/QC) system module. The method includes performing at least one media verification procedure on media content. The method generates a QA/QC score based on results of the performed at least one media verification procedure. The method determines if the media content satisfies a QA/QC standard based on the QA/QC score.
